title: Surfboard Payments Web Guides
description: Developer guides from surfboardpayments.com covering payment methods, SDKs, terminal integrations, and payment lifecycle

guides.title: Tap to Pay on iPhone SDK
guides.description: Accept contactless payments directly on iPhone. Complete integration guide for Surfboard's iOS SoftPOS SDK -- from setup to production.

guides.title: Android SoftPOS SDK
guides.description: Turn Android devices into payment terminals with the Surfboard Android SoftPOS SDK. Complete integration guide from setup to production.

guides.title: EMV Terminal Integration
guides.description: Integrate traditional card-present terminals through Surfboard's unified API. From account setup to live payments in one guide.

guides.title: Payment Page
guides.description: Redirect customers to a Surfboard-hosted checkout page. The fastest way to accept online payments with minimal integration effort.

guides.title: Inter-App Integration
guides.description: Integrate your POS app with CheckoutX using native app switch. Register terminals, process payments, and scan NFC tags through a bi-directional deep link flow.

guides.title: Self-Hosted Checkout
guides.description: Embed a payment form directly in your web app with the Surfboard Online SDK. Full UI control with Surfboard handling PCI compliance.

guides.title: Server-to-Server API
guides.description: Process online payments entirely from your backend with Merchant Initiated Transactions. Full control over recurring payments, subscriptions, and tokenized card flows.

guides.title: Create an Order
guides.description: Learn how to create orders with line items, tax, customer details, and control functions. The starting point for accepting payments with the Surfboard API.

guides.title: Merchant Onboarding
guides.description: Set up merchants and stores on the Surfboard platform. Walk through the full onboarding flow from merchant creation to KYB completion and store setup.

guides.title: Payment Lifecycle
guides.description: Manage the full payment lifecycle from order creation through capture, void, cancel, and refund operations using the Surfboard Payments API.

guides.title: Capture a Payment
guides.description: Finalize a previously authorized payment by capturing funds. Covers delay capture and pre-authorization flows with step-by-step API examples.

guides.title: Terminal & Device Management
guides.description: Manage payment terminals and devices via the Surfboard API. Register in-store and online terminals, configure settings, and handle device operations.

guides.title: Cancel a Payment
guides.description: Stop an in-progress payment before it completes. Use cancellation when a customer abandons checkout or a payment needs to be halted mid-process.

guides.title: Webhooks
guides.description: Receive real-time event notifications via webhooks. Subscribe to order, payment, logistics, and merchant application events with automatic retries and signature verification.

guides.title: Notification Subscriptions
guides.description: Subscribe to persistent, account-level event notifications delivered via email, Slack, or SFTP. Receive settlement reports and operational alerts for merchants and partners.

guides.title: Recurring Payments
guides.description: Implement subscription billing and recurring charges using tokenization, recurring payment configuration, and Merchant Initiated Transactions.

guides.title: Void a Payment
guides.description: Reverse a completed payment before settlement. Voiding stops funds from transferring to the merchant's account, avoiding incorrect transactions.

guides.title: Receipts
guides.description: Generate, email, print, and customise receipts for in-store transactions using the Surfboard Receipts API.

guides.title: Refund an Order
guides.description: Process a full refund by creating a return order with negative quantities. Covers the complete refund flow with API examples and payment method requirements.

guides.title: Partial Refund
guides.description: Refund specific items or a reduced amount from a completed order. Process partial returns by creating a return order with only the items to be refunded.

guides.title: Tips Configuration
guides.description: Configure tipping on Surfboard payment terminals at the merchant, store, or terminal level using a hierarchical override model.

guides.title: NFC Tag Reading
guides.description: Use the NFC Reading API to create tag-reading sessions on payment terminals, scan NFC/RFID-tagged products, and retrieve scanned tag data.

guides.title: Partial Payments
guides.description: Split an order across multiple payment methods or transactions. Accept card, cash, and Swish in any combination to settle a single order.

guides.title: Multi-Merchant Terminals
guides.description: Set up shared payment terminals for multiple merchants using the Multi-Merchant Group API. Ideal for food courts, events, and co-located businesses.

guides.title: Store Management
guides.description: Create, update, verify, and manage in-store and online stores using the Surfboard Payments Store APIs.

guides.title: Gift Cards & Promotions
guides.description: Issue and manage gift cards, track transactions, and create marketing promotions using the Surfboard Payments APIs.

guides.title: Product Catalog
guides.description: Create and manage product catalogs, products, variants, inventory levels, and analytics through the Catalog API.

guides.title: Settlements & Reporting
guides.description: Retrieve settlement reports, view adjustments, manage merchant charges, and register customer profiles for reconciliation and billing.

guides.title: Account & Service Provider Management
guides.description: Create merchant and partner accounts, manage user roles, register service providers, and configure external notifications via the Surfboard API.

guides.title: Payment Methods
guides.description: Activate, deactivate, and list payment methods for a merchant. Manage card, Swish, Klarna, AMEX, Vipps, MobilePay, and more via the API or Partner Portal.

guides.title: Client Auth Tokens
guides.description: Generate client-side authentication tokens for secure API access from browsers and mobile apps without exposing your API key or secret.

guides.title: Partner Branding
guides.description: Configure white-label branding for terminals and payment pages. Set colors, fonts, logos, and cover images at the partner level via API or Partner Portal.
